Why Marketing Professionals Choose Creekside

We're the team other marketers call when they're stuck. Here's what makes us different.

New Customer Growth, Not Just Low CPA

Most agencies optimize for cost per action, but Google and Meta don't know if that's a new customer or a repeat buyer. We optimize for what actually matters: new customer acquisition and revenue growth.

Direct Access to Your Ad Manager

No account managers. No support tickets. You work directly with your dedicated strategist who knows your business inside and out.

Month-to-Month, No Contracts

We earn your business every single month. If we're not delivering results, you can walk away anytime. No long-term commitments required.

Live Audits on First Call

We prove our expertise before you pay us anything. Get a real audit of your account on the first call - not a sales pitch.

Data-Driven Optimization

With backgrounds in accounting (MBA) and mechanical engineering, we bring analytical rigor that most marketers lack. Every decision is backed by data.

$20M+ in Ad Spend Managed

We've audited 200+ ad accounts and managed over $20 million in ad spend across every major industry. We've seen it all and know what works.

Get Your Free $10K Profit Recovery Audit

Discover the 5-7 hidden leaks draining thousands from your Google and Meta ad accounts. Our 247-point checklist identifies exactly where your money is going — most fixes take less than 20 minutes.

Claim Your Free Audit Now →

How We Work Together

A simple, transparent process designed to get you results fast.

01

Consultation

Book a free call where we'll audit your current ad accounts live. No sales pitch - just real analysis and actionable insights you can use immediately.

02

Customization

We build a custom 90-day strategy tailored to your business goals, budget, and industry. Every plan is unique because every business is different.

03

Strategy

We present our findings and recommended approach. You'll see exactly what we'll do, why we'll do it, and what results to expect.

04

Implementation

Once you're ready to move forward, we implement the strategy and start optimizing your campaigns for new customer growth and revenue.

05

Support

You get direct access to your ad manager (no middlemen), weekly updates, and ongoing optimization. We're with you every step of the way.

Our Services

Elevate your digital marketing with Creekside Marketing's precision-driven strategies. With a deep focus on data, performance, and ROI, we help businesses cut through the noise, maximize ad spend, and connect with the right audience.

Google Ads (PPC)

We specialize in using Google Ads to drive targeted traffic and maximize ROI for businesses of all sizes. By analyzing key metrics, we optimize campaigns to ensure cost-effective ad spend while aligning with specific business goals. Whether it's increasing brand awareness, generating leads, or driving sales, we create customized strategies that improve ad performance.

Get started with Google Ads

Meta Ads

We specialize in using Meta Ads to drive targeted traffic and maximize ROI for businesses of all sizes. By harnessing audience insights and precise targeting capabilities, we develop tailored campaigns that align with specific business goals, whether it's boosting brand awareness, generating leads, or driving conversions. Our strategy focuses on optimizing ad creatives, placements, and budgets.

Start advertising with Meta Ads

Peterson Rainey

Co-Founder

Cade Maclean

Co-Founder

Baran Eris

Lead Small Business Consultant

ABOUT US

At Creekside Marketing, we combine analytical expertise with data-driven marketing to help businesses grow. Founded by longtime friends Cade and Peterson, our agency has been delivering results for over four years.

With a background in accounting and an MBA, Cade leads Meta Ads strategy, while Peterson, a mechanical engineer, leads Google Ads strategy. Together with a team of dedicated specialists, they deliver consistent, measurable growth for every client. Baran helps businesses generate and convert traffic with scalable ad campaigns. He focuses on building high-converting funnels and making sure every step of the customer journey supports profitable growth. Despite earning degrees in highly technical fields, we recognized the need for marketers with a deep understanding of numbers and data.

That expertise has made us the people other marketing professionals turn to when they don't know what to do, and we bring that same level of strategy and precision to every client we work with.

Our approach is simple: strategic decision-making, continuous optimization, and custom solutions tailored to your business goals. Let's grow your business together.

Our Services

What Our Clients Are Saying

Real messages from real clients — unfiltered and unedited.

Is Creekside Right for You?

We work best with businesses that meet these criteria:

Perfect Fit

  • Spending $10,000+ per month on ads
  • Have a proven offer that converts
  • Ready to scale and grow revenue
  • Want direct access to your ad manager
  • Value data-driven decision making
  • Looking for long-term strategic partnership

Not a Good Fit

  • Budget under $10,000/month in ad spend
  • Just starting out, no proven offer yet
  • Looking for the cheapest option
  • Want set-it-and-forget-it management
  • Need immediate results in 30 days
  • Prefer working with large agencies

Frequently Asked Questions

What's your pricing structure?
We charge a percentage of your monthly ad spend: 20% for $0-$20k, 15% for $20k-$40k, and 10% for $40k+. When you run both Google and Meta with us, we combine your spend for pricing, so you hit discount tiers faster. Minimum is $2,000/month. We're month-to-month with no long-term contracts.
How is this different from other agencies?
Three key differences: (1) We optimize for new customer growth and revenue, not just low CPA. (2) You get direct access to your dedicated ad manager — no middlemen, no black-box management. Peterson and Cade personally oversee strategy and are always a call away. (3) We prove our expertise with a live audit on the first call before you pay anything.
What industries do you work with?
We've worked with 200+ businesses across healthcare, legal, finance, SaaS, e-commerce, home services, and more. Our data-driven approach works across industries because we focus on fundamentals: targeting, messaging, conversion tracking, and optimization.
How long does it take to see results?
Most clients see improvements within 30-60 days, but we recommend a 90-day commitment to see the full impact. Advertising is about continuous testing and optimization - quick wins are great, but sustainable growth takes time.
What's included in the free audit?
On your first call, we'll do a live audit of your current ad accounts using our $10K Profit Recovery framework - a 247+ point checklist that identifies the 5-7 hidden leaks draining your budget. You'll walk away with actionable insights whether you work with us or not.
